author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: For this initial implementation, using a simpler approach than full autograd hooks. Add an async_sync_gradients method that processes buckets in separate threads using rayon::spawn. Each bucket's allreduce runs independently and in parallel. A barrier at the end ensures all are complete before optimizer.step(). This is simpler than hooking into autograd and still provides bucket-level parallelism.
